name.es: Pan de campo con masa madre (estilo Tartine)

description.en: Chad Robertson's Tartine formula pairs a wet, mostly-white dough with a little whole wheat, an overnight cold proof and a scorching Dutch-oven bake for a blistered mahogany crust and wide-open, custardy crumb.
description.de: Das Brot, das tausend Hobby-Bäckereien inspirierte. Chad Robertsons Tartine-Rezept verbindet einen feuchten, überwiegend hellen Teig mit einem Hauch Vollkornmehl und einer kalten Übernacht-Gare zu einer blasigen, mahagonifarbenen Kruste und einer offenen, cremigen Krume.
description.es: El pan que lanzó mil panaderías caseras. La fórmula Tartine de Chad Robertson combina una masa húmeda mayormente blanca con un toque de integral y un fermento frío nocturno, para una corteza ampollada color caoba y una miga abierta y cremosa.
description.fr: Le pain qui a lancé mille boulangeries amateurs. La formule Tartine de Chad Robertson marie une pâte humide majoritairement blanche à une pointe de blé complet et une pousse froide toute une nuit, pour une croûte boursouflée acajou et une mie grande ouverte et crémeuse.

origin.note: Chad Robertson's Tartine Bakery formula, first published in 'Tartine Bread' (2010); a modern reinvention distinct from the French pain de campagne tradition it draws inspiration from.

ingredients.note: mature, 100% hydration, to build the overnight leaven

method.title: Build the leaven
method.summary: The night before, mix a spoonful of mature starter with whole wheat flour and water; let it ripen at room temperature about 12 hours until domed and bubbly.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Disperse the leaven into most of the water, then mix in both flours until no dry bits remain; rest 30 minutes.

method.title: Add salt
method.summary: Sprinkle in salt with the reserved water and squeeze it through the dough by hand.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Give the dough four vigorous stretch-and-fold turns at 30-minute intervals, then leave it undisturbed until it has grown 20-30%, about 4 hours total.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Divide in two, preshape into loose rounds, rest 30 minutes, then shape into tight boules.

method.title: Cold proof
method.summary: Proof seam-side-up in floured baskets in the refrigerator for 18-20 hours.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Score straight from the fridge and bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C: 20 minutes covered, then about 35 minutes uncovered until deeply browned.

method.title: Rest
method.summary: Cool at least an hour on a rack before the first slice.

source.author: Maurizio Leo, after Chad Robertson / Tartine Bread
source.adaptation: Percentages recomputed to include the leaven's flour/water in the 100% flour base; the source, following Robertson's book, excludes the leaven from hydration.
